Appearance:
Adelmise Roseme Warner, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: San Francisco Police Department

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Joanne Lozenski, Juanita Stockwell and Susan Rolovich's motion for discovery of peace officer personnel records is denied without prejudice for failure to comply with California Rule of Court 3.1113(b). The memorandum neither has a statement of facts nor sets forth any evidence or arguments in favor of disclosure other than a list of requested records. In addition, the Court cannot determine if Section C of the motion seeks to compel responses to certain questions at deposition. Counsel for plaintiff shall comply with California Rule of Court 3.1116 if deposition testimony is submitted as an exhibit. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
